mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notify_task(user_id, template_type, data, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, last_error, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{templateType}, #{data}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, #{lastError}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE notify_task SET status = 'SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0

UPDATE notify_task SET retry_count = #{retryCount}, status = #{status}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_error = #{lastError}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0
